assertions.description: The board edge runs from (0,0) to (83.82,-23.5)mm. The three JSM1-12V-5 relays (RLY1-3) are placed at Y≈-3.05mm rotated 90°, and their footprint courtyard extends approximately +2.85mm above Y=0 (the board top edge). J1 (Molex Mega-Fit connector) similarly extends outside. The analyzer reports edge_clearance_mm values of -17.2mm for each relay and -11.27mm for J1. The REF** logo footprint at (76.25, 43.61)mm is also flagged (-43.61mm clearance). This is a genuine design characteristic of through-board-edge connectors/relays that overhang the PCB.
